title: Spicy Malaysian Tofu Curry
description: A spicy and aromatic Malaysian-inspired tofu curry dish that is easy to make and packed with flavor. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, coconut milk, fish sauce, sugar, cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Add the tofu and cook for another 5-7 minutes, or until it is heated through.
Add the intensely spicy chili peppers and cook for another minute.
Season the curry with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
